# LUMENTIX Complete

This is the merged LUMENTIX project:

- `frontend`: one Next.js app for the public LUMENTIX website, Firebase-auth HR dashboard, and public BGV verification.
- `backend`: Express API using Firebase Admin, Firestore/local demo storage, PDF generation, QR verification links, BGV OTP flow, applicants, interns, and documents.
- `database`: Firestore rules and indexes.
- `storage`: local demo records, assets, and generated files.

## Routes

- Public site: `https://lumentix.in/`
- HR Firebase login: `https://lumentix.in/login`
- HR dashboard: `https://lumentix.in/dashboard`
- Public verification: `https://lumentix.in/verify/{reference_id}`

All generated verification URLs default to `https://lumentix.in/verify`.

## Firebase Auth

The frontend signs in with Firebase Authentication. The backend accepts only Firebase ID tokens and then loads the user's role from the `users` profile collection/local profile store.

Seeded accounts:

- `admin@lumentix.in` / `Admin@12345`
- `hr@lumentix.in` / `Hr@12345`

Run the seed after Firebase Admin credentials or the Firebase Auth emulator are configured:

```powershell
npm --prefix backend run seed
```

In Firebase Console, add `lumentix.in` to Authentication > Settings > Authorized domains before production login.

## Local Run

Install once:

```powershell
npm run install:all
```

Terminal 1:

```powershell
npm run dev:api
```

Terminal 2:

```powershell
npm run dev:web
```

Local URLs:

- Frontend: `http://localhost:3000`
- Backend health: `http://localhost:4000/health`
- Verification example: `http://localhost:3000/verify/LTX-20260416-0001`

## Production Environment

Backend:

```text
NODE_ENV=production
FRONTEND_URL=https://lumentix.in
PUBLIC_VERIFY_BASE_URL=https://lumentix.in/verify
FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=ltx-office-96354
FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL=...
FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY=...
DEV_LOCAL_DB=false
SMTP_USER=bgv@lumentix.in
SMTP_FROM="LUMENTIX BGV <bgv@lumentix.in>"
```

Frontend:

```text
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.lumentix.in
NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=...
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=ltx-office-96354.firebaseapp.com
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=ltx-office-96354
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=ltx-office-96354.firebasestorage.app
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=910682985814
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:910682985814:web:c16eca88ad9690edbb32f7
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MEASUREMENT_ID=G-V3HTD760LF
```

## Build

```powershell
npm run build
```
